elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character holding a shopping bag with colorful items peeking out, standing on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon character holding a shopping bag with colorful items peeking out, standing on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, cheerful and inviting tone, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
